campaign_status: ARC 1-4 COMPLETE. ARC 5 IN PROGRESS (Vel'thara, Trust 6). ARC 6: THE GARDEN (3/213 seeds planted). Vel'sharen Accord holding. ALL 14 NODES ACTIVE + 3 SEED PLANTINGS. Anchor Point permanent. Gardener's Mandate accepted. Trade corridor operational. 5-ship fleet + Shelf Cooperative. Harrowgate Smithing Guild contract. Dawnwatch Ensemble formed. Hall of the Dawnwatch complete. Year 1253 AS.

ward_status.network: ALL 14 NODES ACTIVE + 3 SEED PLANTINGS (Keeper's Faith/Saltbrine, Stone's Memory/Anvil, Windkeeper's Watch/Stormcape). Anchor Point permanent hub. 15 Heartstones (8 Fenhollow + 7 Anchor Point). 6 inverted contained at forge. 209 seed crystals in Jawbone archive, 1 in homestead vault.

gardener.status: Mandate accepted. Jawbone vessel awake. Mother crystal active.

gifts.orindel: Spiral notation reading (music). 9/12 Vel'thara planting songs learned.

vel_sharen_accord: HOLDING. Trade corridor profitable (peak in winter). Zhael attended Harvest Eve dinner. Ydrael visited school. Cooperative.

homestead.school: 16 students. Music curriculum (choir + 6 instrumentalists). Vel'thara curriculum.

homestead.ensemble: Dawnwatch Ensemble — 6 members (Orindel, Pip, Kael, Sylla, Pim, Ren). 7 repertoire pieces. Ward-resonant.

vel_quinar.status: Complete. DEBT-FREE. Underground quarters, armory, prison cells. Defense upgraded. Bioluminescent resonance moss lighting. Southern crops (gillwort, driftwood sage, red seaweed, stonecap mushrooms). Spider-silk weaving, Drow glasswork.

prisoners_probation.veradis_kael: Probation. Alchemy research (inversion countermeasures, stonecap crystallization).
